title: Console Thinking shimmer + Tool component rendering
description: Implement Console chat UX improvements: show AI Elements Shimmer 'Thinking' placeholder after successful send/dispatch until first assistant chunk arrives; render TOOL_CALL and TOOL_RESPONSE with AI Elements Tool component as separate timeline events; keep HITL/session/streaming behavior unchanged; add tests for shimmer lifecycle and tool rendering.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented on feature/analysis-console-shell: added AI Elements Shimmer + Tool components, wired ConversationViewer pending-assistant state for pre-stream 'Thinking' placeholder, switched tool messages to Tool component rendering as separate TOOL_CALL/TOOL_RESPONSE events, and updated unit tests for shimmer lifecycle + tool rendering. Verified with Jest: conversation-viewer streaming/session-routing + console-dashboard tests all passing.
